description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a driveway leading to a carport. The front facade includes a main entrance with a small porch, flanked by landscaped greenery and a tree. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a swing set, while the side yard contains additional seating and a barbecue area. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor amenities. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with minimalistic landscaping and a few ornamental trees. The overall layout is open and spacious, emphasizing outdoor living and relaxation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design features open living spaces and a blend of indoor-outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, car, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side yard seating, and the transition to the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, sun loungers, swing set, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the pool, swing, and the connection between the backyard and the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
